The jp '後継規格' refers to multiple successor standards (the table lists several), but zh/en render it in the singular form which is inaccurate.
In Chinese IT textbooks, 'ギガビット・イーサネット' is more idiomatically rendered as '千兆以太网' (as used in row 3); using '10吉比特以太网' here is inconsistent — '万兆以太网' or '10千兆以太网' would be more idiomatic.

Glossary locks 'IT护照' for 'ITパスポート', so this is glossary-compliant, but the half-width quotation marks "..." in the zh definition are not idiomatic for Chinese typography; full-width 「」 or “” would be preferred.
